positive: A minimalist, highly stylized portrait of a majestic mountain forest silhouette. The scene features stylized evergreen trees and jagged, clean peaks against a deep twilight sky. Use thick, solid lines and strong, graphic contrasts. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, moss green, and stark white negative space. Focus on a central, symmetrical composition that is clean and repeatable for clothing prints. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast linework, negative space illustration, graphic novel style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low contrast, bad anatomy, realistic photo, complex details, busy, logos, typography
